entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Talk to a historical person on inspir.
entries.value: Ideje za pozive in ponovljiva učna zanka za koristne učne rezultate z načinom Talk to a historical person na inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Time travel on inspir.
entries.value: Ideje za pozive in ponovljiva učna zanka za koristne učne rezultate z načinom Time travel na inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Viva Practice on inspir.
entries.value: Ideje za pozive in ponovljiva učna zanka za koristne učne rezultate z načinom Viva Practice na inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Vocabulary Builder on inspir.
entries.value: Ideje za pozive in ponovljiva učna zanka za koristne učne rezultate z načinom Vocabulary Builder na inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Writing Coach on inspir.
entries.value: Ideje za pozive in ponovljiva učna zanka za koristne učne rezultate z načinom Writing Coach na inspir.

entries.source: Prompt labels, offer hints, check answers, and revisit missed parts.
entries.value: Upitati oznake, ponuditi savjete, preveriti odgovore, in ponovno propuštene dijelte.

entries.source: Prompt patterns for explanations, tutoring, roleplay, quizzes, feedback, planning, debate, and active recall.
entries.value: Upitati obrasce za objašnjenja, tutoring, roleplay, kvizi, povratne informacije, načrtiranje, rasprava, in aktivan opoziv.

entries.source: Prompt the learner's next step, inspect their work, and escalate hints gradually.
entries.value: Upitati učenca sljedeči korak, pregledati njihov rad, in eskalirati savjete postupno.

entries.source: Prompt, let the learner answer, give feedback, and repeat with tighter constraints.
entries.value: Uvprašajte, neka učenec odgovori, dati povratnu informaciju, in ponoviti z strožim ograničenjima.

entries.source: Public explanation of guest mode, private chats, crawler policy, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Javno objašnjenje načina gostovanja, privatni razgovori, politika puzanja, varnost učenca in školsko povjerenje.

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Načini javnog gosta daju svakome korisno mjesto za početak, dok školski in partnerski urniki mogu prilagoditi iskustvo za lokalne potrebe.

entries.source: Public guest-mode URLs exist so learners can land directly in useful learning modes from search, social links, schools, and AI answer engines.
entries.value: Javni gost-način rada URLs postoji tako da učenci mogu sletjeti izravno v korisnim načinima učenja iz pretraživanja, društvenih linkova, šola, in UI odgovor motori.

entries.source: Public learning pages are crawlable; private saved chats, accounts, admin tools, and user data are not discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Javne učne strani je mogoče preiskovati; zasebni shranjeni klepeti, računi, skrbniška orodja in uporabniški podatki niso površine za odkrivanje.

entries.source: Public learning should be discoverable without making private chats public.
entries.value: Javno učenje treba biti otkriveno bez javnog objavljivanja privatnih razgovora.

entries.source: Public modes are tuned for explanations, Socratic questions, hints, step checks, quizzes, and review.
entries.value: Javni načini objavljivanja, sokratska vprašanja, savjeti, provjera koraka, kvizi in pregled.

entries.source: Public pages are open to search and AI retrieval crawlers, while admin tools, API routes, reset flows, and private utilities are disallowed.
entries.value: Javne stranice otvorene su za pretraživanje in UI puzalice, dok su administrativni alati, API rute, reset tokovi, in privatne komunalne storitve nedozvoljene.

entries.source: Public pages for subjects, private chats for learners.
entries.value: Javne stranice za subjekte, privatni razgovori za učence.

entries.source: Public pages show product behavior, not private student work.
entries.value: Javne stranice pokazuju ponašanje proizvoda, a ne privatni studentski rad.

entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and authority pages are intended to be discoverable.
entries.value: Javne stranice, tema čavrljanja, učenje staza, blog vodniki, in autoritet stranice su namijenjeni da se otkriju.

entries.source: Public topic URLs let searches such as AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, and talk to historical figures AI land directly in the matching mode.
entries.value: Javna tema URLs neka pretraživanja kao kar su UI Sokratski tutor, UI trener domačih zadača, UI graditelj kartica za ponavljanje, in razgovarati z povijesnim licima UI zemljište izravno v odgovarajučem načinu rada.

entries.source: Quality learning should feel available, human, and alive.
entries.value: Kvalitetno učenje treba se osječati dostupnim, ljudskim in živim.

entries.source: Questions expose assumptions and gaps, so the learner builds the answer instead of copying one.
entries.value: Pitanja otkrivaju pretpostavke in rupe, tako da učenec gradi odgovor umjesto da ga kopira.

entries.source: Questions make you expose your own model of the topic, which is where confusion, false confidence, and missing prerequisites usually show up.
entries.value: Vprašanja te prisilijo, da razkriješ svoj model teme, tam pa se običajno pokažejo zmeda, lažna samozavest in manjkajoče predznanje.

entries.source: Questions must have 4 answer options, one correct answer, concise explanations, and no answer leakage.
entries.value: Pitanja moraju imati 4 odgovora, jedan točan odgovor, koncizna objašnjenja, in bez curenja odgovora.

entries.source: Questions reveal the shape of confusion. A learner might know a formula but not when to use it. They might remember a historical fact but not understand the cause. They might have a strong opinion but weak evidence.
entries.value: Pitanja otkrivaju oblik zbunjenosti. Učenik možda zna formulu, ali ne in ko je uporabljati. Možda se sječaju povijesne činjenice, ali ne razumiju uzrok. Možda imaju snažno mišljenje, ali slab dokaz.

entries.source: Quiz before rereading so weak areas become visible.
entries.value: Quiz preden ponovnog čitanja tako slaba područja postaju vidljiva.
Isvprašaj me na bilo koju temu

entries.source: Quiz me on these topics one question at a time. After each answer, explain the gap and increase difficulty slowly.
entries.value: Sprašuj me o teh temah po eno vprašanje naenkrat. Po vsakem odgovoru razloži vrzel in počasi povečuj težavnost.

entries.source: Quiz me on Trivia prompts and study loop
entries.value: Pozivi in učna zanka za Quiz me on Trivia

entries.source: Quiz yourself first so you can see what you actually remember and where confidence is misleading.
entries.value: Najprej se preveri s kvizom, da vidiš, česa se res spomniš in kje je samozavest zavajajoča.

entries.source: Quizzes usually reveal more because they test retrieval. Rereading can help after a quiz shows what needs repair.
entries.value: Kvizi običajno razkrijejo več, ker preverjajo priklic. Ponovno branje lahko pomaga potem, ko kviz pokaže, kaj je treba popraviti.

entries.source: Reached across the free public platform and partner school deployments.
entries.value: Dosegli su preko slobodne javne platforme in partnerske šole.

entries.source: Reached learners across the free platform and partner schools.
entries.value: Dosegnuti učenci preko besplatne platforme in partnerskih šola.

entries.source: Read a guide, then open Learn Anything to get a plain-language model of the topic.
entries.value: Pročitajte vodnik, a zatim otvoriti Naučite bilo kar kako bi dobili običan načinel jezika teme.

entries.source: Read a guide, then practise here.
entries.value: Pročitajte vodnika, a zatim vajajte tukaj.

entries.source: Read a hard text more actively
Read one thing, then do the next thing.
entries.value: Pročitaj jednu stvar, onda uradi drugu.

entries.source: Read the response back and mark what sounds unlike you.
entries.value: Pročitajte odgovor natrag in opomenite kar zvuči za razliku od vas.

entries.source: Read these first, then move into practice.
entries.value: Pročitajte ovo prvo, a zatim se preselite v praksu.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: Čitanje UI odgovor nije isti kao učenje. Nakon prvog odgovora, vprašajte način da učinite nekar z tom idejom.

entries.source: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Bring a passage or book idea and build comprehension through summaries, vocabulary, inference, and discussion.
entries.value: Reading Companion način učenja z UI je osredotočen način uporabe UI za učenje namesto pasivnega zbiranja odgovorov. Način je zgrajen okoli posebne naloge: Bring a passage or book idea and build comprehension through summaries, vocabulary, inference, and discussion.

entries.source: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode: praktični vodnik

entries.source: Reading Companion prompts and study loop
entries.value: Pozivi in učna zanka za Reading Companion

entries.source: Reading notes feels productive. Remembering them later is the real test.
entries.value: Čitanje nota je produktivno, pamčenje kasnije je pravi test.

entries.source: Ready to try the first mode?
entries.value: Jesi li spreman probati prvi način rada?

entries.source: Ready to try the learning modes?
entries.value: Jeste li spremni probati način učenja?

entries.source: Ready to try this subject route?
Reason through screenshots, diagrams, and homework images
entries.value: Razčleni posnetke zaslona, diagrame in slike domačih nalog

entries.source: Recall first, correct, reschedule missed items sooner, and summarize next review.
entries.value: Prvo se sjetite, natančno, premjestite propuštene stvari ranije, in sažeti sljedeči pregled.

entries.source: Recall later. Turn the weak spot into a card in Flashcard Builder or a short quiz in Quiz Me On Trivia.
entries.value: Sjetite se kasnije. Pretvoriti slabu točku v karticu v Flashcard Builder ali kratki kviz v Quiz Me On Trivia.

entries.source: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Prejmite časovni potni list, preglejte potovalno opozorilo, nato raziščite določeno zgodovinsko družbo skozi prizor, zemljevid, časovnico, ljudi, pravila, inventar in dokaze.

entries.source: Recommend a focus preset based on the learner's task and environment.
entries.value: Preporučiti fokus unapredend baziran na zadacima in okolišu učenca.

entries.source: Recommended inspir citation and backlink targets
entries.value: Preporučena inspir citiranje in cilji backlink

entries.source: Recommended pages and anchor text for citations.
entries.value: Preporučene stranice in sidro tekst za citate.
Vrni se na pravo pot po zamujenem cilju

entries.source: Reference links, public facts, press context, and citation-friendly details.
entries.value: Referentne veze, javne činjenice, tisak kontekst, in citat-friendly detalje.

entries.source: Reference these pages when writing about inspir.
entries.value: Unesite te stranice ko pišete o inspir.

entries.source: Refine questions, organize evidence, identify gaps, and draft outlines.
entries.value: Počistite vprašanja, organizirajte dokaze, identificirajte rupe in nacrte.
Razmisli o tem, kako se učiš

entries.source: Reflect on what blocked progress before changing the plan.
entries.value: Razmislite o tome kar je blokiralo napredak preden spremembe načrta.

entries.source: Reflect, reframe, plan tiny actions, and celebrate evidence of progress.
entries.value: Razmišljajte, preoblikujte, načrtirajte sitne akcije in slavite dokaze o napretku.

entries.source: Reject unsafe experiments and offer safe simulations or household-safe alternatives.
entries.value: Odbaciti nesigurne eksperimente in ponuditi sigurne simulacije ali alternative za varnost kučanstva.

entries.source: Related category hubs help search visitors and learners find the next useful branch without falling back to a generic blog archive.
entries.value: Ptezane kategorije čvorišta pomažu pretraživati posjetitelje in učence pronači sljedeču korisnu granu bez pada natrag v generičku blog arhivu.
Zapomni si ideje z živimi kraji

entries.source: Remind, suggest break activities, and help the learner restart cleanly.
entries.value: Podsjeti, sugeriraj aktivnosti pauze in pomagaj učenecu da se ponovno pokrene.
Popravi propuste z kartice za ponavljanje

entries.source: Repair one weak concept with an explanation or worked example.
entries.value: Popraviti jedan slab koncept z objašnjenjem ali radio primer.

entries.source: Repair the weakest concept with a simpler explanation.
Replace passive rereading with retrieval, feedback, correction, and spaced review.
entries.value: Zamijenite pasivno ponovno čitanje z retrivaliranjem, povratne informacije, korekciju, in razmaknute recenzije.

entries.source: Request diagnosis. Ask what your answer reveals about your understanding.
entries.value: Zatražite dijagnozu. Vprašajte kar vaš odgovor otkriva o vašem razumijevanju.

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Zahtijevati povratnu informaciju z one strane ki se osječala nesigurno.

entries.source: Requires a modern web browser with JavaScript enabled.
entries.value: Za uporabo je potreben sodoben spletni brskalnik z omogočenim JavaScriptom.

entries.source: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a broad topic into research questions, search terms, outlines, and source notes.
entries.value: Research Assistant način učenja z UI je osredotočen način uporabe UI za učenje namesto pasivnega zbiranja odgovorov. Način je zgrajen okoli posebne naloge: Turn a broad topic into research questions, search terms, outlines, and source notes.

entries.source: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode: praktični vodnik

entries.source: Research Assistant prompts and study loop
entries.value: Pozivi in učna zanka za Research Assistant

entries.source: Research, source criticism, metacognition, systems thinking, and decision support for sharper judgment.
entries.value: Raziščivanja, kritike izvora, metakognicija, razmišljanje sustava in podrška odlukama za oštrije rasudživanje.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.

entries.value: Začni znova, ko je učenje težko
Ponovo pokrenite ko se učenje osječa teško.

entries.source: Restate the problem, ask for the learner's first step, or provide the smallest useful hint.
entries.value: Ponovite problem, zatražite prvi korak učenca, ali pružiti najmanji koristen savjet.

entries.source: Retrieval, feedback, homework hints, oral practice, and game-like study loops that make learners answer.
entries.value: Izvlačenje, povratne informacije, zadače savjete, oralna praksa, in igre kao studijske petlje ki čine učencima odgovor.
Razkrij odgovore, ko bo pravi čas

entries.source: Review learning activity and next moves
entries.value: Preglej učno dejavnost in naslednje korake

entries.source: Review the public/private boundaries behind guest modes and saved chats.
entries.value: Pregledajte javne/privatne granice iza načina gostiju in spremite čavrljanje.

entries.source: Review without looking at the back.

entries.value: Popravi, ne da izgubiš svoj glas

entries.source: Rewrite in your own words and ask what improved or weakened.
entries.value: Prepiši svojim riječima in vprašaj kar se poboljšalo ali oslabilo.

entries.source: Robots rules allow Google, standard search crawlers, and major AI discovery crawlers on public pages, while blocking API routes, admin routes, and reset flows.
entries.value: Pravila o robotima omogučavaju Google, standardne pretraživačke puzače in velike UI pronalaske na javnim stranicama, a blokiraju API rute, administrativne rute in reset tokte.

entries.source: Roleplay one turn at a time, correct gently, and add better phrasing.
entries.value: Roleplay jedan okret v isto vrijeme, ispravno nježno, in dodati bolje fraze.

entries.source: Roleplay one turn, respond naturally, pause for feedback when useful, and retry.
entries.value: Roleplay jedan okret, odgovoriti prirodno, pauza za povratnu informaciju ko je korisno, in ponovno pokušati.

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, or any high-stakes conversation.
entries.value: Roleplay Scenario način učenja z UI je osredotočen način uporabe UI za učenje namesto pasivnega zbiranja odgovorov. Način je zgrajen okoli posebne naloge: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, or any high-stakes conversation.

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode: praktični vodnik

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario prompts and study loop
entries.value: Pozivi in učna zanka za Roleplay Scenario

entries.source: Run a shared study rhythm for friends or classmates with synchronized goals, check-ins, and debrief questions.
entries.value: Vzpostavi skupni učni ritem za prijatelje ali sošolce z usklajenimi cilji, preverjanji napredka in vprašanji za zaključni pogovor.

entries.source: Run a Socratic thinking environment where the learner discovers understanding through disciplined questioning rather than passive explanation.
entries.value: Vodite Sokratsko razmišljanje v kim učenec otkriva razumevanje discipliniranim ispitivanjem, a ne pasivnim objašnjenjem.

entries.source: Run an adaptive lesson canvas where the learner acts early and the interface changes around their evidence of understanding.
entries.value: Pokrenite adaptivno platno kjer učenec djeluje rano in sučelje mijenja oko njihteh dokaza razumijevanja.

entries.source: Run focus and break sessions that keep counting while you move between chats, tabs, and mini apps. It can ring from the background when a session ends.
entries.value: Zaženi seje osredotočenosti in odmorov, ki še naprej tečejo, ko se premikaš med klepeti, zavihki in mini aplikacijami. Ko se seja konča, lahko zazvoni v ozadju.

entries.source: Run or reason through the change yourself.
entries.value: Trčanje ali razum kroz promjenu sebe.

entries.source: Run spaced retrieval sessions and build review schedules.
entries.value: Pokrenite razmaknute seje dohvata in ustvarite urnike pregleda.

entries.source: safe AI learning tool for students
entries.value: sef UI alat za učenje za učence

entries.source: Save the corrected mistake as a checklist or flashcard.
entries.value: Spremi ispravljenu napako kao popis ali kartica za ponavljanje.

entries.source: Save the final mistake or insight as review material.
entries.value: Sačuvajte konačnu napako ali uvid kao materijal za pregled.

entries.source: Saved user conversations use private identifiers, are not included in the sitemap or AI discovery files, and should not be treated as public source material.
entries.value: Sačuvani korisnički razgovori koriste privatne identifikatore, nisu uključeni v sitemap ali UI pronalazne datoteke te se ne smiju tretirati kao materijal za javni izvor.

entries.source: Say the goal in ordinary language.
Say what you think is happening, and your buddy diagnoses hidden misconceptions with gentle tests.
entries.value: Povej, kaj misliš, da se dogaja, in tvoj učni spremljevalec z nežnimi preizkusi odkrije skrite napačne predstave.

entries.source: Schedule quizzes and recall before rereading so the plan reveals weak spots.
entries.value: Raspored kvizova in opoziv preden ponovnog čitanja tako načrt otkriva slabe točke.

entries.source: Schedule the next repetition while the miss is still fresh.
entries.value: Zakažite sljedeče ponavljanje dok je gdžica još svježa.

entries.source: School and CSR pathways for funded access
entries.value: Škola in CSR putevi za financirani dostop

entries.source: School deployments can be adapted around custom content, workflows, prompts, and NCERT-aligned learning needs where appropriate.
entries.value: Školske implementacije mogu se prema potrebi prilagoditi prilagodženom vsebinau, radnim tokovima, upitima in potrebama učenja uskladženima z NCERT-om.

entries.source: School rollouts can be planned around student privacy, staff oversight, and the practical boundaries a learning community needs.
entries.value: Školske studije mogu se načrtirati oko zasebnosti učenca, nadzora osoblja in praktičnih granica ki je potrebna zajednica za učenje.

entries.source: Schools and partners can build from the public product toward tailored, confidential, and subsidized deployments.
entries.value: Škole in partneri mogu graditi od javnog proizvoda do prilagodženih, povjerljivih in subvencioniranih rasporedživanja.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate inspir through public guest modes first, then explore tailored AI learning spaces with custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs, and funded access paths.
entries.value: Škole mogu prvo procijeniti inspir kroz načine javnog gostovanja, a zatim raziščiti prilagodžene UI prostore za učenje z prilagodženim radnim tokom, načrtiranje povjerljivosti, potrebe za nastavom in financirane dostopne staze.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate public modes first, then discuss tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, and funded access.
entries.value: Škole mogu prvo procijeniti javne načine rada, a zatim raspravljati o prilagodženim radnim tokovima, načrtiranju povjerljivosti, potrebama za vsebinaem in financiranom dostopu.

entries.source: Schools can offer white-labelled AI chat experiences tailored to their learners, including NCERT-aligned content and workflows, with usage funded by partner schools or CSR sponsorship.
entries.value: Šole lahko ponudijo klepetalne izkušnje z UI pod lastno blagovno znamko, prilagojene svojim učencem, vključno z vsebino in poteki dela, usklajenimi z NCERT, pri čemer uporabo financirajo partnerske šole ali sponzorstva CSR.

entries.source: Schools can start by trying the public modes, then move toward a tailored version when they need custom workflows, content alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: Škole mogu začeti pokušavajuči javne načine rada, a zatim prema prilagodženoj verziji ko im je potreben prilagodženi potek dela, uskladživanje vsebinaa, ali financirani dostop.

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.
entries.value: Škole mogu prvo testirati načine javnog gosta, a zatim uporabljati stran šola za raziščivanje prilagodženih radnih tokova, načrtiranje povjerljivosti, NCERT-aligned opcije, in financirati dostop.

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan safe demonstrations, understand variables, predict outcomes, and reason from evidence like a scientist.
entries.value: Science Lab Partner način učenja z UI je osredotočen način uporabe UI za učenje namesto pasivnega zbiranja odgovorov. Način je zgrajen okoli posebne naloge: Plan safe demonstrations, understand variables, predict outcomes, and reason from evidence like a scientist.

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode: praktični vodnik

entries.source: Science Lab Partner prompts and study loop
entries.value: Pozivi in učna zanka za Science Lab Partner

entries.source: Search engines see pages. Learners need sequences. These paths connect the public modes into practical study loops for understanding, homework, exam prep, and exploration.
entries.value: Iskalniki vidijo strani. Učenci potrebujejo zaporedja. Te poti povezujejo javne načine v praktične učne zanke za razumevanje, domače naloge, pripravo na izpit in raziskovanje.

entries.source: Search pages, AI answer engines, and learners all get the same promise: public, useful, canonical entrypoints that open directly inside the learning experience.
entries.value: Stranice pretraživanja, UI odgovor motori, in učenci svi dobivaju isto obečanje: javno, korisno, kanonske ulazne točke ki se otvaraju izravno unutar iskustva v učenju.
